title: asphodelus albus subsp. subalpinus
intro: Asphodelus albus subsp. subalpinus, also known as white asphodel, is a subspecies of the white asphodel plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the asphodel family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Asphodelus albus subsp. subalpinus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, among other uses. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tea or infusion, and it is also sometimes used as a tincture or in a salve to apply topically.
